### ✅ pitfall_001 — pitfalls

**Question:** What are the most critical mistakes an AI agent would make in this codebase?
**Ground truth:** Four independent language implementations must be kept in sync for scoring logic; Java JDK 21 required locally but CI uses JDK 17 causing version mismatches; Python tests require pytest run from repo root using 'pytest api/'; Go module path is 'github.com/vb-nattamai/bowling-kata' requiring full module imports; LeaderboardService is in-memory non-persistent; 10th frame allows 3 rolls (off-by-one error risk); tools/ directory contains unresolved {{PLACEHOLDER}} templates; TypeScript tests start Express server causing port conflicts
